entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: Region in Africa characterized by drylands and high food insecurity

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITION SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: Condition resulting from a lack of proper nutrition, particularly in children

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: State of extreme economic hardship in dryland regions

entities.name: INCLUSIVE MARKET ORIENTED DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: A conceptual framework to escape poverty by linking farmers to markets

entities.name: RESEARCH-FOR-DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: An approach to generate technologies and innovations to increase dryland farming productivity

entities.name: FOOD SAFETY
entities.description: The practice of ensuring food is free from contaminants such as aflatoxins

entities.name: SMART FOOD
entities.description: A concept based on nutrient-dense products from dryland crops

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A dryland cereal crop targeted for genetic improvement and biofortification

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A dryland cereal crop targeted for genetic improvement and biofortification

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A dryland legume crop targeted for genetic improvement

entities.name: NUTRI-CEREALS
entities.description: Nutrient-dense cereals such as millet and sorghum

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The quality of food providing essential nutrients for health

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of crops or livelihoods to recover from or withstand shocks

entities.name: EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability to optimize the use of water and nutrients

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to survive and produce under water-stressed conditions

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of altering the genetic makeup of crops to improve productivity and quality

entities.name: INTEGRATED CROP SOIL WATER NUTRIENT PEST AND DISEASE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A holistic strategy for managing agricultural resources and threats

entities.name: ICT-BASED EXTENSION SYSTEM
entities.description: The use of information and communication technology to provide agricultural guidance

entities.name: POST-HARVEST HANDLING AND IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: Techniques used after harvest to maintain quality and increase market access

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the nutritional value of crops through breeding or biotechnology
